symbols.name: tower, black/yellow/black, full-chart and simplified

provenance.reference_role: judge59 required_change requires diagonal stripes constrained inside tower silhouette

symbols.required_change: Constrain the yellow/black diagonal stripe fills to the tapered tower body, verify the rendered alpha stays inside the silhouette/outline, then rerun the judge; do not final-approve this artifact.

semantic_brief.brief: TOWERS55 is tower, black/yellow/black, full-chart and simplified. It is used as a tower, black/yellow/black, full-chart and simplified. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: yellow, black with diagonal stripes in the listed colour order.
semantic_brief.colour_pattern: diagonal stripes in the listed colour order
semantic_brief.required_shape: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference
safety_invariants: Preserve the S-57/S-52 symbol class; do not substitute a different buoy/beacon/topmark/hazard family.
Preserve load-bearing colours and colour order.
Preserve topmark count/orientation and band pattern when present.
Use provider images as semantic/shape witnesses; Helm output remains generated-owned artwork.
